nasb.text: Joseph named the firstborn Manasseh, “For,” he said, “God has made me forget all my trouble and all my father’s household.”

esv.text: Joseph called the name of the firstborn Manasseh. “For,” he said, “God has made me forget all my hardship and all my father’s house.”

cnv.text: 約瑟給長子起名叫瑪拿西，因為他說：“　神使我忘記我所有的困苦，以及我父的全家。”

ccb.text: 约瑟给长子取名叫玛拿西，因为他说：“上帝使我忘记一切的困苦和我父亲家。”

csbs.text: 约瑟给长子起名为玛拿西，因为他说：“神使我忘了我一切的苦难和我父的全家。”
